zh.Chelmsford, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可傑爾姆斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Gibson於1564年出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德時，她的父親William Matthew Gibson29歲，母親Augusta Davis25歲。她於1584年5月18日與Richard Henry George在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1593年之後在英國英格蘭艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

zh-hans.Chelmsford, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可傑爾姆斯福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Gibson于1564年出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德时，她的父亲William Matthew Gibson29岁，母亲Augusta Davis25岁。她于1584年5月18日与Richard Henry George在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1593年之后在英国英格兰艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Gibson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Gibb (a pet form of Gilbert) + son, hence ‘son of Gibb’. The name is very common in Ireland, having arrived in that country in the 17th century. It is also occasionally adopted for Ó Gibealláin, see Giblin .

variants.name: Gibb
meanings: English: from the personal name Gibb, a pet form of Gilbert (compare Gibbs ). This surname is also frequent in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Gibson was born in 1564, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, her father, William Matthew Gibson, was 29 and her mother, Augusta Davis, was 25. She married Richard Henry George on 18 May 1584, in Chelmsford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died after 1593, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Gibson est née en 1564, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Matthew Gibson, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Augusta Davis, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Henry George le 18 mai 1584, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée après 1593, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Gibson 1564 in Chelmsford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Matthew Gibson 29 und ihre Mutter Augusta Davis 25. Sie hat am 18. Mai 1584 in Chelmsford, Essex, England Richard Henry George geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1593 in Chelmsford, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Gibson è nata il nel 1564 nel Chelmsford, Essex, England, sua padre, William Matthew Gibson, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Augusta Davis, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Richard Henry George il 18 maggio 1584, nel Chelmsford, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1593, nel Chelmsford, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Gibsonが1564年にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで生まれた時，父William Matthew Gibsonは29歳，母Augusta Davisは25歳であった。1584年5月18日にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードでRichard Henry Georgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1593年以後にイギリスイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Gibson(이)가 1564년 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Matthew Gibson(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Augusta Davis(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1584년 5월 18일 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 Richard Henry George(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Gibson nasceu em 1564, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Matthew Gibson, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Augusta Davis, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Henry George em 18 de maio de 1584, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1593, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Gibson родилась в 1564 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William Matthew Gibson было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Augusta Davis, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Henry George 18 мая 1584 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла после 1593 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Gibson nació en 1564, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Matthew Gibson, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Augusta Davis, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Richard Henry George el 18 de mayo de 1584, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1593, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
